name: sandbox
description: Ephemeral Docker runtime wrapper for constrained shell execution with deterministic outputs.
capability_summary: Runs commands in temporary containers with memory limits and network isolation to reduce host risk.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Shell command string to execute inside the container.

parameters.name: allow_network
parameters.description: Optional override to enable network access. Default is false.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Host directory to mount as /workspace for command execution.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Execute one command in an ephemeral container and return stdout/stderr/exit code.
